U.S. Presidential Candidate Robert Kennedy Advocates For Bitcoin As A Safe Haven
articles.description: As cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC) continue to gain popularity, some advocates suggest they could offer an escape route for the public from the dangers of financial bubbles. Among these advocates is Robert Kennedy, a US presidential candidate, who argued that Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies operate on a decentralized network less vulnerable to market volatility and […]

The SEC Has Failed To Prove XRP Is a Security in Ripple Lawsuit, Says Attorney Jeremy Hogan
articles.description: One crypto legal expert says the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has not proven that XRP is a security in the regulator’s lawsuit against Ripple Labs. In a lengthy thread, attorney and XRP supporter Jeremy Hogan tells his 263,300 Twitter followers why he believes the SEC has so far failed to prove XRP is a security. […]
